title: Website Development
subtitle: Custom Web Apps that Deliver Results!
description: Custom web apps, e-shops and platforms built exclusively in React & Next.js. No WordPress, Wix or templates — only clean, scalable code for modern businesses.
services_description: From landing pages to full web applications — always custom, always React for modern businesses.
portfolio_description: Real projects, real results — all custom-built for modern businesses.
why_choose_description: We combine cutting-edge technology with business needs to deliver exceptional results

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Send us a brief description and we'll respond within 24 hours with an indicative price and timeline.

custom_web_apps.title: Custom Web Apps
custom_web_apps.description: Fully custom React/Next.js applications. No templates or page builders — only clean code.

e-commerce.title: E-commerce
e-commerce.description: Custom online stores with Stripe, order management and inventory. Built from scratch.

landing_pages.title: Landing Pages
landing_pages.description: High-converting pages for campaigns and ads. Fast, SEO-ready, mobile-first.

web_applications.title: Web Applications
web_applications.description: SaaS tools, dashboards, booking systems, portals. Whatever your business needs.

technical_seo.title: Technical SEO
technical_seo.description: Core Web Vitals, schema markup, speed optimization. The technical foundation for top Google rankings.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Updates
maintenance.description: Ongoing development retainer. New features, performance monitoring, security updates.

features.title: Zero templates
features.description: Every project starts from a blank page. No theme reuse or page builders.

features.title: Performance-first
features.description: Next.js, server components, edge caching. Sites that load in < 1 second.

features.title: Direct developer access
features.description: Talk directly to the developer — no account managers or intermediaries.

portfolio_items.name: Asterias Koronisia
portfolio_items.description: Complete booking system with Next.js 16, React 19 and custom NestJS backend. Real-time bookings, Stripe payments, multilingual support, admin dashboard and comprehensive booking management.
portfolio_items.challenge: Build a complete hospitality management system from scratch with real-time availability and secure payment processing.

portfolio_items.name: KYKLOS Education
portfolio_items.description: Complete educational system with Next.js 16, React 19 and custom NestJS backend. Student management, authentication, blog system, newsletter, and 25+ years of educational content.
portfolio_items.challenge: Create a complete educational platform that manages 25+ years of educational content, student authentication, admin management, and provides access to Pan-Hellenic exam materials.

portfolio_items.name: Physio Elpida
portfolio_items.description: Professional WordPress website for physiotherapy clinic in Arta. Services presentation, equipment showcase, online appointment booking and patient contact information.
portfolio_items.challenge: Establish a professional online presence for a physiotherapy clinic with focus on local SEO, easy patient access to service information and online appointment booking system.

process.title: Discovery Call
process.desc: 30 minutes to understand what you need, your goals and budget.

process.title: Design & Wireframes
process.desc: Mockups in Figma before a single line of code is written. Approve the look first.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Clean code, Next.js, TypeScript. Incremental deliveries for review at every step.

process.title: Launch & Support
process.desc: Deploy, testing, SEO setup. Training in management and ongoing support.

process_description: Simple, transparent, effective — from idea to launch.
